title: MagPro case for Samsung Galaxy S24 5G | MagSafe Compatible Protective Cover with Strong Magnetic Adsorption Shockproof Armor Scratch Resistant Polycarbonate Hard Back | Translucent Matte Black
productDescription: Introducing the keeshar MagPro Case—the ultimate blend of style and defense for your phone. This protective cover features a durable, scratch-resistant polycarbonate hard back and reinforced soft TPU edges that offer maximum shockproof armor against drops and impacts. It is fully MagSafe-compatible with strong magnetic adsorption. Designed for a perfect, long-lasting fit, the case includes precisely engineered cutouts for all ports and buttons, ensuring complete access to your device's functions while keeping it pristine and protected from dust and scratches. The translucent matte black finish adds a great look while keeping your phone safe.
